STT 2, 329 [Enuma Anu Enlil 19][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] LUGAL [...]

(o 1') [...] king [...]

o 2'2'

[(x)] ⸢AN⸣.GE₆ ina ITI BI U₄ 3-KAM₂ U₄ 7-KAM₂ U₄ 14-KAM₂ GARan x x-MEŠ UŠ₂-MEŠ KUR₂

(o 2') [(...)] an eclipse takes place in that month on the 3rd day, the 7th day (or) the 14th day: ... deaths of the enemy

o 3'3'

[*] ⸢30⸣ IGI.BAR-ma TA AN.UR₂ EN KI.GUB-šu₂ DUR ša₂ DUNGU BABBAR NIGIN₂

(o 3') (If) the Moon appears and is surrounded by a band of cloud from the horizon up to its position: [(...)] in the middle of heaven the Moon darkens (and) wanes.

o 4'4'

[(x)] ⸢ina⸣ ŠA₃ ANe 30 a-dir iš-šur

o 5'5'

⸢*⸣ AN.GE₆ GAR-ma U₄ ŠU₂up LUGAL KARAŠ DAB-su ana UN-MEŠ KUR SU.GU₇ dan-na IGI-MEŠ

(o 5') (If) an eclipse takes place and the day clouds over: a king - catastrophe will seize him. As for people of the land - they will experience severe famine.

o 6'6'

[*] AN.GE₆ GAR-ma dIŠKUR GU₃-šu₂ ŠUB ZAḪ₂ KUR ina INIM DINGIR-MEŠ DU₁₁.GA

(o 6') (If) an eclipse takes place and Adad raises his voice: annihilation of the land at the command that the gods speak. The people of the land will be heaped up (as corpses). The king of an important land will die quickly.

o 7'7'

⸢UN⸣-MEŠ KUR ik-kam-ma-ra LUGAL KUR SIGti ar₂-ḫiš UŠ₂

o 8'8'

[*] ⸢AN⸣.GE₆ GAR-ma AN SUR UN-MEŠ KUR SU.GU₇ IGI-MEŠ

(o 8') (If) an eclipse takes place and Mars flashes: the people of the land will experience famine.

o 9'9'

[...] ⸢GAR-ma⸣ NIM.GIR₂ ib-riq a-bu-ub la A-<MEŠ> KUR ub-bal

(o 9') [...] takes place and lightning flashes: a waterless flood will sweep away the land.

o 10'10'

[...] ⸢DUNGU⸣ ana ŠA₃ DUNGU KU₄-MEŠ DINGIR-MEŠ GALGA KUR i-di-nu

(o 10') [...] (and a) cloud enter a cloud: the gods will judge the intelligence of the land. [...] his days will be short.

o 11'11'

[...] U₄-MEŠ-šu₂ LUGUD₂.DA-MEŠ

o 12'12'

[...] ⸢ana⸣ ŠA₃-šu₂ KU₄ DINGIR-MEŠ a-bu-ub KUR ⸢ar₂⸣-ḫiš GAR-MEŠ

(o 12') [...] enter it: the gods will quickly bring about a flood for the land.

[... EN].⸢NUN⸣ MURU₂ GAR-ma EN.NUN ig-mur u tu₁₅KUR DU
